runs.analysis: This dataset contains daily weather observations for 15 cities across multiple countries over three dates (2025-01-01 to 2025-01-03), including temperature in °C and °F, humidity (%), wind speed (km/h), and a categorical condition label. Quality looks good for a small sample: consistent columns, plausible values, and both temperature units provided (which enables cross-checking), though it’s very short in time span and conditions are subjective categories that may vary by source. You should still validate unit consistency (e.g., °F vs °C conversion) and handle special characters in city names (e.g., “São Paulo”) when importing. You can use it for basic exploratory analysis (city comparisons, correlations between humidity/wind/temp), simple forecasting demos, classification exercises on “condition,” or as a toy dataset for ETL/data-cleaning pipelines and visualization dashboards.
